item.title: Public Holidays in Paraguay: Calendar, Culture, and Practical Tips (as of 2026)
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: A practical overview of Paraguay’s public holidays: what they mean, 2026 dates, movable days, asuetos, and insider tips for everyday life, authorities, and travel.
